extraction.one_line_summary: LÓPEZ Miguel won from a late breakaway after Contador's attack split favorites on final 10km, Froome extended GC lead
tactical_patterns: Sky maintained pace limiting break to 5min despite rain, preventing time losses before mountain finale.
Contador attacked with 10km remaining on final climb, too late to bridge but split GC contenders behind.
BODNAR forced selection in break on first climb, enabling three-rider cooperation into finale over larger group.

rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel: positive: Won biggest career victory at 23, proving superior climbing to experienced breakaway companions on observatory finish
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: Attacked final 10km but bridging effort to break proved futile, suggests form insufficient for stage wins
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: negative: Lost 1:50 to Froome on mountain stage despite favorable altitude, dropped to barely holding third overall
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: negative: Lost 4min and dropped from top ten, catastrophic collapse on summit finish suggests altitude weakness
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: Listed among big losers on first-category summit, concerning form decline after early race positioning
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Extended advantage three days after Sallent win, Sky pacing strategy again nullified GC rivals' climbing
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: Moved to only 3sec behind Chavez for podium spot, opportunistic gain while others suffered
